LookOut

Published from GitHub Actions. Prefer the curated walkthrough (real axe / a11y signal) for sharing; latest/ is the plain CI smoke output and changes on every deploy.

Curated (recommended for README / social)

  • HTML report
  • Export bundle (JSON v2)

CI smoke (latest/ — moving target)

  • Latest smoke report
  • Latest smoke bundle

Versioned smoke (immutable per git tag)

Example: v0.5.1/report.html (one directory per release tag).
